evals.prompt: Help me define our ICP. We have 40 customers mostly in AI startups and research labs.
assertions: Checks for product-marketing-context.md first
Selects Mode A (Define ICP) or asks to confirm
Asks for customer list with attributes before calling icp_deep_dive
Asks which customers are the 'best' fits
Calls icp_deep_dive with customer_data
Calls buyer_group_analyzer after
Outputs a structured ICP definition with firmographic and technographic signals
Offers to save to .agents/icp-profile.md

evals.prompt: I have a list of 200 accounts. Help me prioritize which to go after first.
assertions: Selects Mode B (Score & Prioritize)
Reads existing ICP from icp-profile.md or asks for ICP attributes
Calls icp_scoring_model
Calls account_prioritization with the account list
Delivers tiered output: Tier 1/2/3
Offers to create Lark tasks for Tier 1 accounts

evals.prompt: Calculate our TAM SAM SOM for a board presentation.
assertions: Selects Mode D (Market Sizing)
Asks for or reads product description, target segments, pricing, and geography
Calls tam_sam_som_calculator with all required inputs
Presents TAM, SAM, SOM with clear assumptions
Notes that assumptions are defensible for investor/board use

evals.prompt: I have notes from 10 customer interviews. Can you pull out ICP patterns?
assertions: Selects Mode F (Interview Synthesis)
Asks user to provide interview notes or paste them
Asks for interview type (discovery, win, loss, churn)
Calls icp_interview_synthesizer
Surfaces pain points, triggers, customer language, and fit signals
Offers to update product-marketing-context.md with customer language

evals.prompt: Generate LinkedIn targeting criteria based on our ICP.
assertions: Selects Mode E (Lookalike & Ad Targeting)
Reads ICP from icp-profile.md or asks user to describe it
Confirms LinkedIn as the platform
Asks for budget tier
Calls lookalike_signal_generator with icp_profile and platforms=['linkedin']
Delivers job titles, seniority, company size, industry, and skills filters
